settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.appearance_desc: Theme, animations, effects, colors, and your display name
settings.renderer_desc: Aggressive mode, launcher restart, doze, and switching behavior
settings.system_desc: Notifications, integrations, backup, and advanced options
settings.language_desc: Change the display language of the GAMA interface

appearance.title: APPEARANCE
appearance.effects_desc: Gradient background, frosted glass blur, and particle animations
appearance.colors_desc: Accent color, gradient palette, OLED mode, and dynamic theming
appearance.theme_locked_oled: Forced to Dark while OLED mode is on
appearance.oled_mode_on_desc: Active — backgrounds are pure black. Theme locked to Dark
appearance.oled_mode_off_desc: Makes backgrounds pure black — great for battery life on OLED screens
appearance.stagger_animations_desc: Cards inside panels cascade in one by one. Turn this off for snappier panel opens
appearance.your_name_desc: Used in greetings and notifications — completely optional

effects.title: EFFECTS
effects.effects_desc: Gradient background, frosted glass blur, and particle animations
effects.blur_desc: Frosted glass look on panels — toggle and choose transition style
effects.gradient_background_on_desc: A colorful gradient that slowly shifts behind your home screen
effects.gradient_background_oled_desc: Disabled in OLED mode — background is pure black
effects.particles_desc: Small floating dots, stars, or a live sky — pick your style
effects.particles_oled_desc: Visible in OLED mode — but some effects are limited

blur.title: BLUR
blur.blur_toggle_desc: Frosted glass effect behind panels and dialogs — subtle but really polished
blur.blur_transition_optimised_desc: Optimised: blur is computed once at full intensity, then fades in and out via alpha. Fast and smooth on any device.
blur.blur_transition_real_desc: Real: blur radius is recalculated every frame as the panel opens. More precise, but heavier on the GPU.

particles.title: PARTICLES
particles.toggle_desc: Small dots drift around in the background — gives the app a living feel
particles.appearance_desc: Star mode, time mode, and how particles look visually
particles.motion_desc: Speed, parallax, and how particles move
particles.performance_desc: Particle count and refresh rate settings
particles.time_mode_desc: A sun and moon move across the sky based on the actual time of day
particles.star_mode_desc: Swaps regular particles for tiny twinkling stars — looks great at night
particles.speed_desc: Slow is 1× · Medium is 3× · Fast is 6×
particles.parallax_desc: Tilt your device and the particles shift with it, adding a nice 3D depth effect
particles.native_refresh_rate_desc: Runs particle physics at your display's full refresh rate. Silky smooth on 120Hz devices, but uses more battery. Leave this off on older or lower-end devices

colors.title: COLORS
colors.colors_desc: Accent color, gradient palette, OLED mode, and dynamic theming
colors.oled_mode_desc: Turns backgrounds pure black — great for battery life on OLED screens
colors.dynamic_color_desc: Pulls accent colors from your wallpaper — updates automatically with Material You
colors.advanced_picker_desc: Adds a hex input field so you can type any color directly — e.g. #4895EF
colors.accent_color_desc: Used for buttons, highlights, and borders throughout the app
colors.gradient_start_desc: The color the gradient fades from at the top of the screen
colors.gradient_end_desc: The color the gradient fades into at the bottom of the screen

oled_panel.title: OLED MODE
oled_panel.subtitle: On OLED and AMOLED screens, true black pixels are completely off — so this saves real battery
oled_panel.toggle_off_desc: Inactive — uses your normal theme background

renderer.title: RENDERER
renderer.aggressive_mode_desc: Applies the renderer to every installed package — more thorough, but make sure you've read the warning first
renderer.kill_launcher_desc: Force-stops the launcher after switching so it picks up the new renderer immediately. Leave OFF on Xiaomi / MIUI — enabling it can trigger MIUI's restriction system.
renderer.doze_mode_desc: Forces your device into deep doze right away — great for squeezing out extra battery life
renderer.show_gpuwatch_desc: Shows the GPUWatch shortcut on the main screen alongside the Resources button. Samsung devices only — requires Game Booster / Game Tools (enable from Developer Options).
renderer.verbose_mode_desc: Shows the full shell output while switching — great for seeing exactly what's happening
renderer.tap_outside_to_close_desc: Tap anywhere outside a panel to close it — turn this off if you'd rather use the back button
renderer.api_changed_now: Graphics API last changed just now

system.title: SYSTEM
system.notifications_desc: Get a nudge if you've been on OpenGL for a while and forget to switch back
system.backup_desc: Save all your settings to a file or bring them back from a backup
system.crash_log_desc: Something went wrong? Check here for clues on what happened

notifications.title: NOTIFICATIONS
notifications.subtitle: GAMA can remind you to switch back to Vulkan if you've been on OpenGL for too long
notifications.permission_required_desc: GAMA needs permission to send you notifications — tap below to grant it.
notifications.reminders_on_opengl_desc: You're on OpenGL now — reminder is active
notifications.reminders_off_desc: Will alert you if you switch to OpenGL and stay on it
notifications.boot_notification_desc: Shows a notification after a reboot suggesting you switch to Vulkan

backup.title: BACKUP
backup.subtitle: Pack up all your GAMA settings into a file, or restore them from a previous backup — great before reinstalling
backup.export_desc: Save everything — theme, preferences, excluded apps — to a JSON file
backup.restore_desc: Pick a backup file to bring all your settings back exactly as they were

crash_log.title: CRASH LOG
crash_log.shizuku_required: Shizuku required to read system crash logs.

language_panel.title: LANGUAGE
language_panel.restart_notice: Restart GAMA for all changes to take effect
language_panel.community_note: Add new languages by dropping a JSON file into assets/translations/

integrations.title: INTEGRATIONS
integrations.subtitle: Plug GAMA into your existing Android automations and shortcuts
integrations.tasker_desc: Use broadcast intents to switch renderers automatically based on time, app launch, WiFi, or anything Tasker can do
integrations.tasker_link_desc: This will open the GAMA Tasker integration guide on GitHub. It covers how to use broadcast intents to automate renderer switching based on time, app launch, WiFi network, and more.
integrations.qs_tiles_desc: Three tiles: Vulkan, OpenGL, and Doze. Each one lights up when active and switches instantly on tap, no menu needed
integrations.qs_tiles_dialog_body: Pull down your notification panel and tap the Edit button (pencil icon). Scroll through the available tiles until you find the GAMA ones: Vulkan, OpenGL, and Doze. Drag the ones you want into the active area, then tap Done. Each tile shows as highlighted when its mode is active.
integrations.widget_desc: Put a Vulkan / OpenGL toggle right on your home screen. One tap and you're switched
integrations.widget_dialog_body: Long-press on an empty area of your home screen and select Widgets from the menu that appears. Scroll the list until you find GAMA, then long-press the widget and drag it where you want. The widget lets you switch between Vulkan and OpenGL with a single tap, right from your home screen.
integrations.github_desc: Browse the source code, report issues, or grab the latest release
integrations.github_link_desc: Opens the GAMA GitHub repository where you can browse source code, report issues, and download releases.
integrations.discord_desc: Join the official GAMA community server
integrations.discord_link_desc: Opens the official GAMA Discord server — ask questions, share feedback, and stay up to date.
integrations.shizuku_desc: GAMA needs this to run — grab it here if you haven't already
integrations.shizuku_link_desc: Opens the official Shizuku website. Shizuku is required for GAMA to execute renderer switching commands.

main.standing_by: Standing by and awaiting your command

greetings.late_night_2: Some thoughts only come after midnight. 🌙
greetings.late_night_4: The world narrows to this moment. 🌙
greetings.late_night_5: There's a particular clarity to these hours. 🌙

greetings.late_night_named_4: The world narrows to this moment, %s. 🌙
greetings.late_night_named_5: There's a particular clarity to these hours, %s. 🌙

greetings.morning_2: Up and at it! ☀️ The day has potential.
greetings.morning_3: A brand new day! ☀️ Anything is possible.
greetings.morning_5: The day is yours! ☀️ Go and take it.

greetings.morning_named_3: A brand new day, %s! ☀️ Anything is possible.
greetings.morning_named_5: The day is yours, %s! ☀️ Go and take it.

greetings.afternoon_named_5: There you are, %s! ☀️ Let's do something great.
greetings.evening_3: The day is winding down — worth reflecting on. 🌙
greetings.evening_4: Unwinding has its own kind of beauty. 🌙

greetings.compact_evening_named_5: Hope it was a good one, %s. 🌙

dialogs.shizuku_not_running_body:
Shizuku needs to be running for GAMA to work.

1. Open the Shizuku app
2. Tap 'Start' to activate the service
3. Come back to GAMA

If Shizuku won't start, follow the wireless pairing instructions inside the Shizuku app.
dialogs.shizuku_permission_body:
GAMA needs permission to use Shizuku.

1. Open Shizuku
2. Tap 'Authorized apps'
3. Find GAMA and enable it
4. Close GAMA from the recents list
5. Reopen GAMA
dialogs.warning_body_with_launcher: This will temporarily restart System UI, the launcher, and other processes to apply the change. Your device will be back to normal shortly.
dialogs.warning_body_no_launcher: This will temporarily restart System UI and other processes to apply the change. Your device will be back to normal shortly.
dialogs.clear_recents_body: Clearing the Recents menu makes sure all apps restart fresh with the new renderer. Skip this if you want to keep your open apps.
dialogs.github_title: Would you like to visit the GAMA repository on GitHub?
dialogs.developer_subtitle: Developer tools for testing and debugging.
dialogs.gpuwatch_body: GAMA can't open GPUWatch directly. You will be taken to Developer Options where you can find and enable 'GPUWatch' yourself.
dialogs.aggressive_intro: Using Aggressive mode is powerful, sure, but comes with some side effects that you should know about:
dialogs.aggressive_warning_1_body: Your default browser and keyboard will be reset
dialogs.aggressive_warning_2_body: WiFi-Calling/VoLTE may drop. Fix: Settings → Connections → SIM Manager, toggle SIM off and back on
dialogs.aggressive_warning_3_title: ... and other things we haven't documented yet
dialogs.aggressive_warning_3_body: ARE YOU SURE THIS IS WORTH WHATEVER YOU'RE DOING?
dialogs.aggressive_warning_3_footer: This mode is NOT recommended. If you're just pressing buttons to see what they do, don't mess with this.
dialogs.easter_egg_subtitle:
Built with obsessive attention to detail,
late nights, and too much hot cocoa.

widget.bg_match_desc: Follows the dark/light setting in GAMA

notification.boot_body: Good time to switch to Vulkan?
notification.reminder_msg_1: Is now a good time to switch to Vulkan? ⚡
notification.reminder_msg_2_unnamed: Still on OpenGL — Vulkan is ready whenever you are!
notification.reminder_msg_2_named: Still on OpenGL, %s — Vulkan is ready whenever you are!
notification.reminder_msg_3_unnamed: Just a heads up — you could be getting more speed with Vulkan!
notification.reminder_msg_3_named: Just a heads up, %s — you could be getting more speed with Vulkan!
notification.reminder_msg_4_unnamed: Psst… Vulkan is just one tap away
notification.reminder_msg_4_named: Psst, %s… Vulkan is just one tap away
notification.reminder_msg_5_unnamed: A friendly little reminder — Vulkan could make things faster!
notification.reminder_msg_5_named: A friendly little reminder, %s — Vulkan could make things faster!
